endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/operations
endpoints.description: Lists available operations for the resourcehealth resource provider
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses
endpoints.description: Lists the current availability status for all the resources in the subscription. Use the nextLink property in the response to get the next page of availability statuses.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses
endpoints.description: Lists the current availability status for all the resources in the resource group. Use the nextLink property in the response to get the next page of availability statuses.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses
endpoints.description: Lists the historical availability statuses for a single resource. Use the nextLink property in the response to get the next page of availability status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses/current
endpoints.description: Gets current availability status for a single resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/childAvailabilityStatuses
endpoints.description: Lists the historical availability statuses for a single child resource. Use the nextLink property in the response to get the next page of availability status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/childAvailabilityStatuses/current
endpoints.description: Gets current availability status for a single resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/childResources
endpoints.description: Lists the all the children and its current health status for a parent resource. Use the nextLink property in the response to get the next page of children current health
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.
